scripts.deploy: npm run build:schematics && npm run check-dependencies && npm run compile:projects && npm run build:projects && npm run pack-projects && npm run publish:projects
scripts.install:clean: rimraf package-lock.json node_modules && npm run i
scripts.start: nodemon --watch src --watch packages -e ts --exec "vite build && node --enable-source-maps dist/test.es.js"
scripts.start:debug: nodemon --watch src --watch packages -e ts --exec "vite build && node --enable-source-maps --inspect-brk dist/test.es.js"
